chat.author: Jie Dong
chat.text: Just checked draft-ietf-teas-ns-ip-mpls-09, in section 5.1.1, there is one bullet on "Overloaded service identifier as NRP Selector", and VPN identfier is mentioned as an example, then a digaram of MPLS label stack is given. It would be good to mention that MPLS data plane is used as an example here
